heading: Authority to conduct program relating to fissile materials
label: 6151 Authority to conduct program relating to fissile materials
text: The Secretary of Energy may conduct programs designed to improve the protection, control, and accountability of fissile materials in Russia.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6151 was renumbered .section 8262 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2565 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
